Title: Define Level 1 scope and FCI boundary
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Andy Volk; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: Handbook; level_1 artifacts
Description: Confirm the in-scope FCI environment, system boundary, users, devices, locations, and data flows.
Definition of Done: Approved Level 1 scope statement exists and is referenced by all Level 1 work.

Title: Complete Level 1 owner matrix
Parent: Define Level 1 scope and FCI boundary
Supporting Owners: Ryan Lin; Joshua Hornback; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: L1_prep_owner_matrix.md
Description: Assign accountable and supporting owners for each Level 1 family, artifact, and evidence set.
Definition of Done: Every Level 1 family and artifact has a named accountable owner.

Title: Build Level 1 practice evidence index
Parent: Define Level 1 scope and FCI boundary
Dependencies: L1_prep_evidence_index.md
Description: Map each Level 1 practice to source artifacts, operational proof, owner, and review cadence.
Definition of Done: All 17 Level 1 practices have an evidence path or tracked gap.

Title: Run Level 1 gap assessment
Parent: Define Level 1 scope and FCI boundary
Dependencies: L1_prep_gap_assessment_tracker.md; evidence index
Description: Assess all Level 1 practices against current documentation and operating evidence.
Definition of Done: All Level 1 gaps are recorded with owners, severity, and closure targets.

Title: Approve Level 1 readiness package
Parent: Define Level 1 scope and FCI boundary
Dependencies: Completed Level 1 evidence and gap closure
Description: Review the consolidated Level 1 package and approve readiness posture or residual risk decisions.
Definition of Done: Leadership signs off on Level 1 readiness status and remaining actions.

Title: Define Level 2 CUI scope and SSP baseline
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Andy Volk; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: Handbook; level_2 artifacts; SSP
Description: Confirm the in-scope CUI environment, asset categories, users, services, data flows, and assessment boundary.
Definition of Done: Approved Level 2 boundary and SSP baseline exist for all Level 2 work.

Title: Tailor Level 2 SSP to the live environment
Parent: Define Level 2 CUI scope and SSP baseline
Supporting Owners: Andy Volk; Ryan Lin; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: CMMC_L2_SSP_062025.md
Description: Rewrite the SSP with real systems, trust zones, owners, inventories, and data flows.
Definition of Done: The SSP is environment-specific, current, and approved for readiness use.

Title: Build Level 2 evidence index
Parent: Define Level 2 CUI scope and SSP baseline
Dependencies: L2_prep_evidence_index.md; SSP
Description: Map all Level 2 practices to artifacts, proof sources, owners, and review dates.
Definition of Done: All Level 2 practices have evidence paths or tracked gaps.

Title: Maintain Level 2 POA&M and gap register
Parent: Define Level 2 CUI scope and SSP baseline
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Ryan Lin; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: L2_gap_register.md; L2_prep_POAM_tracker.md
Description: Track structural gaps, practice gaps, remediation owners, due dates, and closure evidence.
Definition of Done: All material Level 2 deficiencies are tracked through closure.

Title: Run Level 2 mock assessment and executive review

Supporting Owners: Andy Volk; Ryan Lin; Sulaiman Ahmad

Description: Prepare for and execute an internal mock assessment, then brief leadership on readiness and residual risk.
Definition of Done: Mock assessment is complete, findings are logged, and leadership has reviewed readiness status.

Description: Complete Level 2 AC documentation, implementation validation, evidence, review, and approval.
Definition of Done: AC Level 2 family package is complete and traceable to all applicable practices.

Title: Finalize AC Level 2 policy
Dependencies: L2 gap register; SSP; existing templates
Description: Create and tailor the Level 2 AC policy to the live CUI environment.
Definition of Done: Policy is approved, environment-specific, and mapped to practices.

Title: Finalize AC Level 2 procedure
Dependencies: L2 gap register; SSP; existing templates
Description: Create and tailor the Level 2 AC procedure to the live CUI environment.
Definition of Done: Procedure is approved, operationally accurate, and linked to evidence sources.

Title: Validate AC Level 2 family implementation
Dependencies: AC policy and procedure; SSP
Description: Validate the family-level implementation approach, records, system behavior, and operating cadence for AC.
Definition of Done: Family-level implementation checks are complete and deficiencies are recorded.

Title: Collect AC Level 2 family evidence set
Dependencies: AC implementation validation; Level 2 evidence index
Description: Assemble the baseline artifact and proof set for the Level 2 AC family.
Definition of Done: The family evidence set is complete, current, and referenced in the evidence index.

Title: Review AC Level 2 family package
Dependencies: AC family evidence set; POA&M
Description: Review the full Level 2 AC package for completeness, traceability, and assessment readiness.
Definition of Done: The family package passes internal review or has tracked corrective actions.

Title: Approve AC Level 2 family package
Dependencies: AC family review complete
Description: Approve the Level 2 AC package for inclusion in the final readiness set.
Definition of Done: Leadership approval or explicit residual risk acceptance is recorded.
